title: Sick Leave Policy and Reporting Absences
text:
Q: What is the sick leave policy and how do I report an absence?
A: Our sick leave policy allows employees to take up to 10 paid sick days per calendar year. If you are unable to work due to illness, please notify your direct supervisor as soon as possible, ideally at least one hour before your scheduled start time. You can report your absence via email or by calling your supervisor directly. For absences longer than three consecutive days, a doctor's note may be required upon your return. If you have any questions regarding your sick leave balance or need to discuss your situation further, please contact the HR department at hr@company.com. Remember to keep your supervisor updated on your recovery and expected return date. Your health is important to us, and we encourage you to take the necessary time to recover.
